summary: The notebook has two notes: a foundations course note on gradient descent and a paper-reading note on the Transformer, spanning machine learning and deep learning.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers gradient descent fundamentals: the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Only one course note exists; broader ML foundations like linear models, regularization, and evaluation metrics are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the Transformer architecture: self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 translation results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on sub-quadratic attention variants, improved positional schemes, or modern training and scaling recipes.
